mechanism: Red light activates phytochrome B photoreceptor; Pfr form accumulates in light.
evidence_sentence: ma3 sorghum lacks a 123-KD phytochrome that predominates in light-grown plants and that is present in non-ma3 plants.

mechanism: Far-red light activates phytochrome A photoreceptor. SbPhyA is one of three sorghum phytochromes on chr 1.
evidence_sentence: SBI-01 (where PHYA, PHYB and PHYC are located)

mechanism: Phytochrome C is activated by red light; Ma5 locus encodes SbPhyC.
evidence_sentence: Ma5 = SbPhyC (Sobic.001G087100, Chr01)

mechanism: Cryptochrome 1 perceives blue light; DNA-photolyase domain required for activity.
evidence_sentence: CRY1-b1 SNP722...Located in DNA photolyase domain; affects blue light reception capacity.

mechanism: SbFKF1/SbFFL contains a LOV domain that forms a covalent adduct with FMN upon blue-light illumination, activating the F-box protein to recruit substrates via SCF ubiquitin ligase.
evidence_sentence: SbGI physically interacts with the sorghum FKF1-like (SbFFL) protein, and the SbGI-SbFFL interaction is stimulated by blue light.

mechanism: PhyB (Ma3) is required for evening-light activation of SbPRR37 in long days; loss of PhyB eliminates the evening expression peak of SbPRR37.
evidence_sentence: PhyB is required for light activation of SbPRR37 and SbGHD7 expression in the evening of long days.

mechanism: PhyB activates SbGhd7 expression through evening-phase light signaling in long days.
evidence_sentence: Sorghum phytochrome B inhibits flowering in long days by activating expression of SbPRR37 and SbGHD7, repressors of SbEHD1, SbCN8 and SbCN12.

mechanism: PhyB represses SbCN15 (SbFT1 = Hd3a-subclade florigen) via a mechanism that is PRR37/Ghd7-independent and photoperiod-independent. Loss of PhyB causes ~60-fold upregulation of SbCN15.
evidence_sentence: PhyB mediated repression of SbCN15 expression occurs regardless of photoperiod.

mechanism: Phytochrome C (Ma5) acts together with PhyB to delay flowering in LD through activation of floral repressors; PhyC-light signaling contributes to PRR37 activation.
evidence_sentence: Ma5 encodes phytochrome C (phyC)...acts as a photoperiod-dependent flowering repressor.

mechanism: PhyC contributes to evening-light signaling that activates Ghd7 in LD, parallel to PhyB.
evidence_sentence: The other photoreceptor, Phytochrome C (PhyC), is proposed as the candidate gene for the Ma5 (SbPhyC) locus.

mechanism: Conserved circadian oscillator: morning-phased CCA1 binds EE elements in the TOC1 promoter and represses its transcription.
evidence_sentence: LHY, CCA1, TOC1 (circadian oscillator).

mechanism: Evening-phased TOC1 represses CCA1 transcription, completing the core oscillator feedback loop.
evidence_sentence: LHY, CCA1, TOC1 (circadian oscillator).

mechanism: LHY and CCA1 act redundantly to repress TOC1 in the morning.
evidence_sentence: LHY, CCA1, TOC1 (circadian oscillator).

mechanism: Morning-phased CCA1/LHY represses GI to restrict GI expression to the afternoon/evening peak.
evidence_sentence: GI (circadian regulator linking to CO→FT flowering pathway).

mechanism: SbGhd7 binds the SbELF3 promoter at the TGAATG motif and directly represses its transcription (Tadesse 2024 ChIP-seq + DAP-seq).
evidence_sentence: repressing transcription of...EARLY FLOWERING 3 (SbELF3).

mechanism: SbGhd7 directly represses SbFKF1 (ChIP-seq target, TGAATG binding motif).
evidence_sentence: repressing transcription of...FLAVIN-BINDING, KELCH REPEAT, F-BOX1 (SbFKF1).

mechanism: GI is required for normal diurnal SbPRR37 expression; sbgi-ems1 loses 2-5 fold PRR37 abundance across key time points.
evidence_sentence: SbPRR37 transcript...levels in sbgi-ems1 plants were diminished by 2- to 5-fold at these time points.

mechanism: GI-FKF1 complex stabilizes CO and promotes CO transcription at 12 h after dawn, coincident with SbGI peak expression.
evidence_sentence: The major effect of sbgi-ems1 was diminishment of SbCO transcript levels at 12 hr after dawn in either photoperiod.

mechanism: GI activates Ehd1 expression, mainly under SD at ZT12 (SD peak strongly attenuated in sbgi).
evidence_sentence: The peak of SbEHD1 occurring at 12 hr under SD was significantly reduced in sbgi-ems1.

mechanism: GI promotes SbFT expression indirectly via SbCO and SbEhd1; sbgi reduces florigen transcripts at dawn under both LD and SD.
evidence_sentence: transcript levels in sbgi-ems1 plants were reduced at dawn under both LD and SD conditions.

mechanism: GI promotes SbCN8/SbFT8 expression indirectly via SbCO and SbEhd1 activation.
evidence_sentence: sbgi-ems1 plants had low expression of SbCN8 and SbCN12 under LD and SD photoperiods.

mechanism: GI promotes SbCN12/SbFT10 expression through the CO-Ehd1 module.
evidence_sentence: sbgi-ems1 plants had low expression of SbCN8 and SbCN12 under LD and SD photoperiods.

mechanism: Blue-light-activated FKF1 forms a complex with GI that stabilizes CO protein and promotes CO transcription at late afternoon.
evidence_sentence: In long days, GI activates CONSTANS (CO) expression in conjunction with FKF1.

mechanism: In LD, SbPRR37 upregulates SbCO expression at dawn (opposite to Arabidopsis). Differential SbCO expression between LD and SD requires PRR37. NOTE: this activation edge is paired with the PRR37-CO co-repressor action on SbCN8/12 (E025 below) — the net effect of PRR37 in LD is floral repression via the CO-Ehd1-FT axis.
evidence_sentence: SbPRR37 activates expression of the floral inhibitor CONSTANS and represses expression of the floral activators Early Heading Date 1, FLOWERING LOCUS T, Zea mays CENTRORADIALIS 8, and floral induction.

mechanism: SbPRR37 represses SbEhd1 expression in LD, preventing the induction of florigens.
evidence_sentence: SbPRR37 and SbGHD7 repress expression of the grass specific floral activator, SbEHD1.

mechanism: SbPRR37 suppresses SbFT1/SbCN15 florigen expression in LD via repression of SbEhd1 and/or direct repression in co-repressor complex with SbCO.
evidence_sentence: cooperatively repressed by the classical sorghum maturity loci.

mechanism: SbPRR37 represses SbCN8 (SbFT8) florigen expression in LD. Casto/Murphy 2019 show PRR37 and CO act as co-repressors on SbCN8/SbCN12 in LD.
evidence_sentence: SbPRR37 and SbGHD7 repress expression of...SbCN8.

mechanism: SbPRR37 represses SbCN12 (SbFT10) florigen in LD.
evidence_sentence: SbPRR37 and SbGHD7 repress...SbCN12.

mechanism: SbGhd7 directly binds the SbEhd1 promoter (TGAATG motif) and represses its transcription. Direct ChIP-seq/DAP-seq target.
evidence_sentence: repressing transcription of...floral activators EARLY HEADING DATE (SbEhd1).

mechanism: SbGhd7 represses SbFT1 (SbCN15) florigen in LD via repression of SbEhd1 and direct binding.
evidence_sentence: cooperatively repressed by the classical sorghum maturity loci.

mechanism: SbGhd7 represses SbCN8 (SbFT8) florigen in LD, both directly and via SbEhd1 repression.
evidence_sentence: SbGhd7...inhibiting expression of the floral activators SbEHD1, SbCN12 and SbCN8.

mechanism: SbGhd7 directly binds the SbFT10 promoter and represses its transcription. Tadesse 2024 shows SbFT10 as the major directly-bound florigen target.
evidence_sentence: repressing transcription of the major florigen FLOWERING LOCUS T 10 (SbFT10).

mechanism: SbCO activates SbEhd1 expression ~25-fold in SbCO-2 backgrounds vs sbco-null.
evidence_sentence: CO activates expression of SbEHD1...~25-fold increase in RIL105 vs RIL112.

mechanism: SbCO activates SbCN8 (SbFT8) florigen expression ~10-fold (canonical CO → FT activation, day-length regulated at protein level).
evidence_sentence: expression of SbCN8 was ~10-fold higher in RIL105 (SbCO-2).

mechanism: SbCO strongly activates SbCN12 (SbFT10) florigen ~100-fold.
evidence_sentence: SbCN12 mRNA levels were ~100-fold higher in RIL105 (SbCO-2).

mechanism: SbCO mildly activates SbCN15 (SbFT1) florigen (effect small compared to other florigens).
evidence_sentence: mRNA level of SbCN15 (Hd3a) was similar in the two genotypes (minimal effect).

mechanism: SbEhd1 activates SbFT1 directly; SbEhd1 OE promotes SbFT1 promoter activity.
evidence_sentence: SbEhd1OE activated the promoters of three functional florigens (SbFT1, SbFT8 and SbFT10), dramatically accelerating flowering.

mechanism: SbEhd1 directly activates SbFT8 (SbCN8) florigen promoter.
evidence_sentence: SbEhd1OE activated the promoters of three functional florigens (SbFT1, SbFT8 and SbFT10).

mechanism: SbEhd1 directly activates SbFT10 (SbCN12) florigen promoter.
evidence_sentence: SbEhd1OE activated the promoters of three functional florigens (SbFT1, SbFT8 and SbFT10).

mechanism: Ma2 locus (Sobic.002G302700, SMYD lysine methyltransferase) increases SbPRR37 expression amplitude in LD. Loss of Ma2 (ma2 = L141*) reduces PRR37 peak amplitude, advancing flowering.
evidence_sentence: Ma2 delayed flowering in long days by selectively enhancing the expression of SbPRR37 (Ma1) and SbCO.

mechanism: Ma2 activates SbCO expression in LD; loss of Ma2 reduces both SbCO expression peaks.
evidence_sentence: enhanced expression of both SbPRR37 (Ma1) and SbCO by Ma2 in Ma1Ma2 genotypes.

mechanism: SbID1 establishes the capacity for SbCO expression; sbid1-2 mutants lose wildtype SbCO waveform across all time points.
evidence_sentence: floral activator SbCO transcript accumulation in sbid1-2 was low at all time points and lacked the wild-type waveform.

mechanism: SbID1 required for SbCN8/SbFT8 florigen expression peaks.
evidence_sentence: Expression of florigen-encoding genes SbCN8 and SbCN12 was also lower in sbid1-2 than in the wild type.

mechanism: SbID1 required for SbCN12/SbFT10 florigen expression.
evidence_sentence: Expression of florigen-encoding genes SbCN8 and SbCN12 was also lower in sbid1-2 than in the wild type.

mechanism: SbID1 required for proper SbPRR37 diurnal expression; sbid1-2 abolishes PRR37 peaks.
evidence_sentence: SbPRR37 and SbGhd7 transcripts were low at all time points in sbid1-2.

mechanism: SbID1 required for proper SbGhd7 diurnal expression; primary Ghd7 peak at ZT16 is absent in sbid1-2.
evidence_sentence: primary SbGhd7 peak at ZT16 in the wild type...did not occur in sbid1-2.

mechanism: sbi-miR156h cleaves SbSBP19 transcripts via complementary site in 3' UTR.
evidence_sentence: sbi-MIR156h was determined to target 14 genes...SBP transcription factors.

mechanism: sbi-miR156h targets SbSBP4 for cleavage.
evidence_sentence: SbSBP19, SbSBP4, SbSBP7...targeted by miR156h.

mechanism: SPL/SBP TFs (e.g. SbSBP19) directly bind MIR172a promoter and activate its transcription (age-pathway module).
evidence_sentence: In maize, ZmSPL13 and ZmSPL29 directly bind to the promoter of and activate the expression of mir172.

mechanism: sbi-miR172a cleaves SbAP2 / Sobic.001G036800 (rap2.7-ortholog) transcripts, relieving AP2-mediated repression of flowering.
evidence_sentence: sbiMIR172a targets the orthologs of the maize genes ids1 and sid1...rap2.7...glossy15.

mechanism: Maize rap2.7 ortholog represses ZmFT (ZCN8); sorghum AP2/Sobic.001G036800 likely represses SbFT8/SbFT10 in similar fashion.
evidence_sentence: ortholog of the maize gene rap2.7 which acts as a negative regulator of flowering time.

mechanism: SbFT1 protein physically interacts with SbFD1 to form the florigen activation complex (FAC) in the shoot apical meristem.
evidence_sentence: SbFT1 directly interacts with SbFD1 in Y2H/BiFC assays.

mechanism: SbFT1 binds sorghum 14-3-3 scaffold protein; all three florigens bind 14-3-3.
evidence_sentence: interact with sorghum 14-3-3 proteins.

mechanism: SbFT8 binds Sb14-3-3 scaffold protein (florigen activation complex).
evidence_sentence: SbFT8 and SbFT10 directly interact with Sb14-3-3 but not with SbFD1.

mechanism: SbFT10 binds Sb14-3-3 scaffold protein (florigen activation complex).
evidence_sentence: SbFT8 and SbFT10 directly interact with Sb14-3-3 but not with SbFD1.

mechanism: Florigen activation complex (SbFT1-FD-14-3-3) activates SbSOC1 (SbMADS31) expression in the shoot apical meristem.
evidence_sentence: In Arabidopsis, FT together with SUPPRESSOR OF OVEREXPRESSION OF CONSTANS (SOC1), promotes expression of meristem identity gene LFY and AP1, leading to floral transition.

mechanism: Florigen SbFT8 activates SbSOC1 (SbMADS31) in the meristem.
evidence_sentence: Three FLOWERING LOCUS T-like genes (SbFT1, SbFT8 and SbFT10)...serve as the ultimate mediators of photoperiod response and floral transition.

mechanism: Florigen SbFT10 activates SbSOC1 in the meristem (major florigen, directly repressed by Ghd7).
evidence_sentence: FLOWERING LOCUS T 10 (SbFT10)...major florigen.

mechanism: Conserved SOC1 → LFY activation in the floral transition.
evidence_sentence: FT together with SUPPRESSOR OF OVEREXPRESSION OF CONSTANS (SOC1), promotes expression of meristem identity gene LFY and AP1.

mechanism: SOC1 activates AP1 in the floral transition; SbMADS7 is the sorghum AP1/FUL clade MADS.
evidence_sentence: SbMADS7 (Sobic.002G010100)...clusters with the AP1/FUL clade...act as regulators of floral initiation.

mechanism: LFY directly activates AP1 transcription; mutual reinforcement in floral meristem identity.
evidence_sentence: promotes expression of meristem identity gene LFY and AP1.

mechanism: SbFT1 florigen promotes the vegetative-to-reproductive transition in the shoot apical meristem, reducing days to flowering.
evidence_sentence: three genes...activate flowering in transgenic Arabidopsis plants, suggesting florigenic potential.

mechanism: SbFT8 florigen accelerates flowering transition.
evidence_sentence: SbEhd1OE activated the promoters of three functional florigens (SbFT1, SbFT8 and SbFT10), dramatically accelerating flowering.

mechanism: SbFT10 is the major florigen in sorghum (directly repressed by Ghd7); promotes flowering transition.
evidence_sentence: repressing transcription of the major florigen FLOWERING LOCUS T 10 (SbFT10).

mechanism: SbFT12 (Sb06g012260, FlrAvgD1, panicoid-specific PEBP) is a floral suppressor; loss-of-function confers photoperiod-insensitive early flowering. Reduction-of-function at CAAT-box deletion in 5'UTR drove temperate adaptation.
evidence_sentence: wild-type Sb06g012260 is a floral suppressor.

mechanism: SbFT2 (Sobic.003G017200, ZCN14-like) expression in mature leaf tissue associates with earlier flowering (TWAS in temperate-adapted panel).
evidence_sentence: SbFT2 (Sobic.003G017200)...expression of genes in mature leaf tissue was significantly associated with observed flowering time.

mechanism: SbAP2 (Sobic.001G036800, rap2.7-ortholog) represses flowering; loss (via miR172) relieves repression.
evidence_sentence: ortholog of the maize gene rap2.7 which acts as a negative regulator of flowering time.

mechanism: SbSOC1 (SbMADS31) activates LFY/AP1 in the shoot apical meristem, triggering floral meristem identity.
evidence_sentence: SbMADS31 (Sobic.004G003434) encodes a SOC1 MADS-box transcription factor subfamily protein.

mechanism: SbAP1 (SbMADS7) commits the meristem to floral identity and triggers flowering.
evidence_sentence: SbMADS7 (Sobic.002G010100)...act as regulators of floral initiation.

mechanism: SbLFY, conserved meristem identity integrator, triggers floral transition.
evidence_sentence: promotes expression of meristem identity gene LFY and AP1, leading to floral transition.

mechanism: Under inductive SD, early-morning peak of GA20/GA1 coincides with floral induction, hastening flowering. GA promotes flowering in grasses via DELLA destabilisation and FT activation.
evidence_sentence: under inductive 10-h photoperiods, the peak of GA20 and GA1 levels was shifted to an early morning peak, and flowering was hastened.

mechanism: PhyB gates the timing of GA20 and GA1 peaks diurnally. In LD phyB-active plants, GA peak shifts to midday (non-inductive); in phyB-null plants, GA peaks shift to early morning (inductive for flowering).
evidence_sentence: The conversion of GA19→GA20 appears to be a critical control point regulated by phytochrome B.

mechanism: Long-day light evening phase coincides with SbPRR37 evening mRNA peak via PhyB; in SD the evening peak is eliminated because the phase occurs in darkness.
evidence_sentence: peaks of SbPRR37 mRNA abundance in the morning and in the evening...evening peak of SbPRR37 expression in SD does not occur due to darkness.

mechanism: LD induces evening peak of SbGhd7 via PhyB; SD eliminates this peak (darkness).
evidence_sentence: evening peak of expression is attenuated in SD when this phase occurs in darkness.

mechanism: Short-day treatment induces SbFT1 (and other florigens) in photoperiod-sensitive genotypes by relieving PRR37/Ghd7 repression.
evidence_sentence: induced by 1 wk SD treatment in photoperiod-sensitive genotypes.

mechanism: SD induces SbFT8 (via de-repression by PRR37/Ghd7 decrease in SD).
evidence_sentence: induced by 1 wk SD treatment in photoperiod-sensitive genotypes.

mechanism: SD induces SbFT10 (major florigen) by relieving Ghd7/PRR37 repression.
evidence_sentence: induced by 1 wk SD treatment in photoperiod-sensitive genotypes.

mechanism: In LD when SbPRR37 is present, SbCO acts as a co-repressor of SbCN8 together with SbPRR37 (context-dependent sign flip from activator to repressor).
evidence_sentence: SbPRR37 and SbCO are co-repressors of the expression of SbCN8 and SbCN12 in long days.

mechanism: SbEhd1 is a major floral activator whose overexpression dramatically accelerates flowering by upregulating all three functional florigens.
evidence_sentence: SbEhd1OE activated the promoters of three functional florigens...dramatically accelerating flowering.

mechanism: SbPRR37 is the key LD floral repressor; dominant Ma1 causes late LD flowering; loss of function (sbprr37) confers photoperiod insensitivity and earlier flowering.
evidence_sentence: Ma1, the major repressor of sorghum flowering in long days, was identified as the pseudoresponse regulator protein 37 (PRR37).

mechanism: SbGhd7 is a strong LD floral repressor; overexpression completely prevents flowering. Acts in parallel with SbPRR37 (additive).
evidence_sentence: SbGhd7 overexpression (OE) completely prevented sorghum flowering.

mechanism: PhyB (Ma3) activates LD floral repressors PRR37+Ghd7; phyB null (ma3^R) shows ~60 days earlier LD flowering.
evidence_sentence: 58M phyB-1 vs 100M PHYB...Long Days (14h) 62 vs 126 days.

mechanism: PhyC (Ma5) acts as a dominant LD flowering repressor; ma5 conferred strong flowering inhibition requires dominant allele.
evidence_sentence: Ma5 = SbPhyC...strong flowering inhibition (dominant form required).

mechanism: Ma2 (SMYD-family methyltransferase) delays flowering in LD by enhancing PRR37+CO expression; ma2 (L141*) flowers ~100 days earlier than Ma2.
evidence_sentence: 80M (ma2) flowers earlier than 100M (Ma2).

mechanism: SbGI promotes flowering via CO-Ehd1-FT module; sbgi-ems1 shows ~30-day delay under LD and ~35-day delay under SD.
evidence_sentence: sbgi-ems1 homozygous plants averaged 30 days more than sbgi-ems1 heterozygous and SbGI WT siblings.

mechanism: SbID1 establishes the capacity for flowering by activating both SbCO+florigens and SbPRR37+SbGhd7. Strong sbid1-2 mutant delays flowering ~170 days.
evidence_sentence: sbid1-2 (Q199*)...phenotype: ~170-day delay; near-complete flowering block.

mechanism: SbCO activates SbEhd1+florigens, promoting flowering. Acts as activator in null-PRR37/Ghd7 backgrounds; in dominant Ma1Ma6 backgrounds CO contributes to LD co-repression.
evidence_sentence: CO...functions as an activator of flowering in long and short days in sorghum genotypes using RILs with null versions of Sbprr37-1 and Sbghd7-1.

mechanism: Circadian clock gates morning and evening SbPRR37 expression peaks (via SbGI and evening complex); even under continuous light the bimodal pattern persists.
evidence_sentence: circadian clock modulates SbPRR37 expression under...free-running conditions.

mechanism: Circadian clock gates bimodal (morning + evening) SbGhd7 mRNA accumulation.
evidence_sentence: SbPRR37 and SbGHD7 RNA abundance peaks in the morning and in the evening...through coordinate regulation by light and output from the circadian clock.

mechanism: SbCO expression is gated by the circadian clock; peaks regulated by SbPRR37, clock, and day length.
evidence_sentence: SbCO shows peaks of expression...regulated by SbPRR37, the circadian clock, and day length.

mechanism: SbPRR37 expression is light-dependent: no expression observed under continuous darkness (DD).
evidence_sentence: In DD, neither peak of SbPRR37 expression was observed.

mechanism: Rice Hd1 (sorghum SbHd1 = SbCO) forms heterotrimeric complex with NF-YB11 that directly binds Ghd7 promoter to activate Ghd7 transcription (rice evidence, conservation in sorghum implied).
evidence_sentence: Hd1...functions as an Ehd1 repressor through interaction with...Ghd7.

mechanism: In dominant PRR37+Ghd7 background (LD), SbCO co-represses SbCN12/SbFT10 with SbPRR37 — sign context-flip relative to null background where CO activates.
evidence_sentence: SbPRR37 and SbCO are co-repressors of the expression of SbCN8 and SbCN12 in long days.

mechanism: SbFT6 (Sb02g029725, near FlrAvgB1 QTL) associates with photoperiod response; likely a florigen-family activator of flowering.
evidence_sentence: Sb02g029725 (SbFT6), a second FT family member mapping near the FlrAvgB1 QTL, showed highly significant photoperiod response association (P = 1.53×10⁻⁶).

mechanism: PhyB/PhyC mediate SbCO protein destabilisation in LD daylight hours, reducing CO activity (opposite of Arabidopsis); in SD this is released.
evidence_sentence: Reduced PhyB/C-mediated degradation of SbCO in SD, relative to LD.

mechanism: Evening Complex subunit ELF3 represses morning/evening PRR genes; inferred in sorghum from rice OsELF3-1 ortholog, which negatively regulates OsPRR1/37/73/95 (Zhao 2012).
evidence_sentence: OsELF3-1 negatively regulates OsPRR1, OsPRR37, OsPRR73 and OsPRR95 expression.

mechanism: Evening Complex subunit ELF3 represses Ghd7; in rice, OsELF3 suppresses Ghd7 expression, accelerating flowering under LD. Mechanism conserved in sorghum Evening Complex.
evidence_sentence: OsELF3-1 suppresses a flowering repressor grain number, plant height and heading date 7 (Ghd7) to indirectly accelerate flowering under long-day (LD) conditions.

mechanism: Evening Complex DNA-binding subunit LUX targets promoters of morning/evening PRR genes; rice OsLUX recruits OsELF3-1 and OsELF4s to repress Hd1 and Ghd7. Mechanism inferred for sorghum LUX ortholog.
evidence_sentence: The evening complex target suppresses the expression of Hd1 and Ghd7 directly to modulate photoperiodic flowering in rice.

mechanism: LUX binds the Ghd7 promoter as part of the Evening Complex; rice evidence (OsLUX recruits ELF3/ELF4 to repress Ghd7).
evidence_sentence: Evening complex target suppresses the expression of Hd1 and Ghd7 directly.

mechanism: ELF4 and LUX physically associate with ELF3 to form the Evening Complex; ELF3 serves as docking scaffold. Without ELF4/LUX, ELF3 loses repressive activity on clock output.
evidence_sentence: ELF3 served as a docking protein that brought together ELF4 and LUX; the biological activities of the three components peak in the evening, as does the formation of the evening complex.

mechanism: Dawn light entrains the morning oscillator: CCA1 expression peaks at dawn and is light-gated. Conservation across Arabidopsis and grasses (rice OsCCA1).
evidence_sentence: LHY, CCA1, TOC1 (circadian oscillator)...entrained by light-dark cycles.

mechanism: Dawn light activates LHY morning expression alongside CCA1 in the core oscillator. Light entrainment is a canonical clock input.
evidence_sentence: LHY, CCA1, TOC1 (circadian oscillator)...entrained by light-dark cycles.

mechanism: Morning-phased CCA1/LHY MYB TFs repress evening-phased genes including PRR37; canonical across Arabidopsis and grass oscillators. Conservation inferred for sorghum from the clock-gated bimodal SbPRR37 expression (Murphy 2011).
evidence_sentence: circadian clock modulates SbPRR37 expression under...free-running conditions.

mechanism: SbID1 (maize ID1 / rice Ehd2 ortholog) activates SbEhd1 expression. In rice, Ehd2 up-regulates Ehd1 under both SD and LD; ehd2 mutants show 145-365 day flowering delays.
evidence_sentence: Ehd2 up-regulates the transcription of Ehd1 and of the downstream FT-like genes, Hd3a and RFT1, under both SD and LD conditions.

mechanism: PhyB represses ethylene biosynthesis in shoots; the phyB-null cv 58M overproduces ethylene ~10-fold compared to PHYB cv 100M. Part of the shade-avoidance / photoperiod response linking light perception to ethylene levels.
evidence_sentence: cv 58M grossly overproduced ethylene, with peak values about 10 times higher than cv 100M.

mechanism: PhyB inactivates ELF3 post-translationally; in rice, OsPhyB inactivates OsELF3 through post-translational modifications in response to light, thereby attenuating Evening Complex repression on Ghd7/PRR37 in LD.
evidence_sentence: OsPhyB inactivates OsELF3 through post-translational modifications in response to light.

mechanism: FD bZIP TF acts with the florigen-FD-14-3-3 FAC complex to activate AP1 at the shoot apical meristem, triggering floral meristem identity. Canonical module conserved from Arabidopsis FD.
evidence_sentence: FT together with FD and 14-3-3 proteins forms the florigen activation complex (FAC) that activates AP1 and SOC1 to initiate floral transition.

mechanism: SbFD1 is a required component of the florigen activation complex; loss of FD in Arabidopsis/rice abolishes florigen output even when FT is present. Promotes flowering.
evidence_sentence: SbFT1 directly interacts with SbFD1 in Y2H/BiFC assays...SOC1, LFY, AP1 are activated by the florigen-FD-14-3-3 complex.

mechanism: Sb14-3-3 is a required scaffold of the florigen activation complex (binds all three florigens). Loss of 14-3-3 function breaks FAC assembly and delays flowering.
evidence_sentence: SbFT8 and SbFT10 directly interact with Sb14-3-3...florigen activation complex (FAC).

mechanism: SPL/SBP TFs directly activate SOC1 expression at the meristem (age-pathway convergence with photoperiod pathway). Conserved from Arabidopsis SPL9 → SOC1 and maize ZmSPL targets.
evidence_sentence: SbSBP19, SbSBP4, SbSBP7 are targeted by miR156h...SPL TFs act as regulators of floral initiation via SOC1/AP1 in the age pathway.

mechanism: SbELF3 promotes flowering by repressing Ghd7 and PRR37 (relieving florigen repression). Rice oself3 mutants flower earlier than WT under LD; sorghum SbELF3 inferred analogous.
evidence_sentence: oself3-1 mutant flowers earlier than wild-type...OsELF3-1 suppresses Ghd7 to indirectly accelerate flowering under LD.
